channel.title: Engineering Management on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering Management on simeononsecurity

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook: From First Commit to Engineering Lead
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineering" , "career playbook" , "programming" , "developer career" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.

item.title: Managing a Development Team
item.category: "engineering management" , "managing developers" , "software team leadership" , "agile scrum kanban" , "devops for developers" , "engineering manager career"
item.description: How to transition into engineering management, build and lead development teams, run agile processes, and handle platform engineering responsibilities.
